caption:
Your lead just called, texted, and booked, through three different apps.

Most shops run a missed-call tool, a separate texting app, a calendar, and a review request service, all bolted together. Every handoff between them is a place a lead goes cold.

The Black Arrow platform puts it all behind one login: CRM, two-way texting, missed-call callback, booking, review collection, and revenue reporting in a single inbox.

Run it on your own leads for 14 days. Full access, no card, cancel anytime.

Refer another business. When they subscribe, you both get a free month automatically.

See it work with your own numbers. DM TRIAL.

#ServiceBusiness #CRMForContractors #LeadFollowUp #SmallBusinessGrowth #AllInOnePlatform
rationale: Fills the under-served Platform/Free Trial category by naming the real tool-sprawl pain the app.blackarrow.ltd feature set (unified inbox, texting, booking, reviews, reporting) directly solves, using the reach-favoring reel format for a cold-audience offer.
